institution.name: Charles R Drew University of Medicine and Science

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Charles R Drew University of Medicine and Science fell 66% between 2023 and 2024 (43.8% → 14.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Charles R Drew University of Medicine and Science fell 63% between 2007 and 2010 (334 → 124).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Charles R Drew University of Medicine and Science rose 54% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.0k → $23.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Charles R Drew University of Medicine and Science rose 54% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.0k → $23.0k).
